title: begonia extensa
intro: Begonia extensa, also known as Begonia x hybrida, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. It is a hybrid plant bred for its ornamental value, with large, showy flowers in shades of pink, white, and red. The Begonia extensa plant is not typically associated with medicinal properties or health benefits, but its leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments. In traditional medicine, Begonia extensa is sometimes used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures for their purported anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
